files.description: All current TS RPC command input shapes plus extension_ui_response variants.
Strict JSONL serialization plus LF, CRLF, and final unterminated input reader observations.
Success, success-with-data, null data, command errors, parse error, and unknown-command quirk responses.
Base deterministic faux prompt event stream envelopes.
Thinking, tool call, tool execution, usage, details, and stop reason event shapes.
Session-level queue, compaction, retry, and session info events forwarded by TS RPC mode.
Extension UI request methods and response commands with deterministic request ids.
